sentences.english: Every Saturday morning, I go to the local farmer's market near my apartment.
sentences.korean: 매주 토요일 아침 아파트 근처 지역 농산물 시장에 가요.

sentences.english: The vegetables are so much fresher than the supermarket, and you can actually talk to the farmers who grew them.
sentences.korean: 채소가 슈퍼마켓보다 훨씬 신선하고 실제로 그것을 키운 농부와 이야기할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: My favorite part is trying the free samples — homemade jams and freshly baked bread.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 부분은 무료 시식이에요 — 수제 잼과 갓 구운 빵이요.

sentences.english: It's a bit more expensive than the supermarket, but I think it's worth it to support local farmers.
sentences.korean: 슈퍼마켓보다 좀 더 비싸지만 지역 농부를 지원하는 게 가치가 있다고 생각해요.

quiz.question: What does '집에서 만든/수제' mean in English?
